title: F.S. Co. Banira Pack
description: Modrinth leggo, Fabric 1.19 pack of client side qol mods
body:
Rip [Technic Launcher](https://www.technicpack.net/modpack/fs-co-vainilla-server.1181125), [PolyMC](https://polymc.org) + [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mods) new best friend

Basically vanilla plus for stock Minecraft with client side tweaks and fixes like whit and iris shaders, etc. Uses fabric for now, looking into seeing how quilt support for mods is and testing that out later.

Highly recommended to run with [Complementary Shaders](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/complementary-shaders), you can tweak the settings using the built in iris shader settings to lower the gpu load.

A minimap is provided but feel free to swap it out with Xaero's minimap mods, both the [full screen map](https://chocolateminecraft.com/worldmap.php) and [hud](https://chocolateminecraft.com/minimap2.php)
